---
title: "Blog"
page-layout: full
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  image-align: right
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 9
  fields: [image, title, date, categories, reading-time, description]
---

::: hero-panel
[KAXA Blog]{.hero-kicker}

# Space stories, updates, and learning journeys

Explore articles from our community. New posts added under `blog/posts/` automatically appear here.
:::
